\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classJobParser}{Job\+Parser}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Streaming, stack-\/based reader for simple tag-\/delimited job files. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Lightweight XML-\/like tag parser for the solver job file. 

Provides a minimal, streaming parser that understands a restricted, whitespace-\/ separated tag syntax, e.\+g.\+:

$<job> <mesh> mesh.mesh </mesh> <excitation> ... </excitation> </job>$

The class keeps a stack of open tags to allow nested blocks and exposes helpers to read typed values and to jump to the end of the current tag. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{JobParser_8h_source}{Job\+Parser.\+h}}.
